General.Name: Tongdao Liepin Group
General.Description: Tongdao Liepin Group, an investment holding company, provides talent acquisition services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates Recruitment, a talent recruitment platform that acts as a communication bridge between enterprises, headhunters, business users, and professional managers. It also operates Many Faces, a recruitment management SaaS platform that offers talent management, scientific screening, and AI efficiency improvement; Campus Recruitment, a campus recruitment solution that includes recruitment presentations and employer branding; Xunhou Human Resource, a flexible employment solution that offers job outsourcing, commissioned recruitment, human resources agency, campus recruitment, etc.; Lebanban, an enterprise employee training and assessment platform; Questionnaire, a questionnaire survey platform that provides data collection, storage, and analysis tools; and Recruitment Outsourcing, a human resources outsourcing service platform that provides enterprises with one-stop full-risk job outsourcing services. In addition, it offers online survey, talent, human resource, and education services. The company was formerly known as Wise Talent Information Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tongdao Liepin Group in July 2020. Tongdao Liepin Group was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
